channel.description: Latest marine jobs for Full Crew
channel.title: Maritime Union - Job for Mariners

item.description:
Location: Chesapeake, VA
Description:

Norfolk Naval Shipyard is seeking experienced skilled maritime trades, engineers, engineering technicians, and business agents for their 2026 Summer Job Fair. This event is for external hires, including transitioning service members, veterans, and military spouses. The job fair will take place on July 18, 2026, at the Chesapeake Conference Center in Chesapeake, VA. Hiring managers will be on-site to conduct interviews for various positions such as A/C Equipment Mechanic, Boilermakers, Civil Engineer, Crane Operator, Marine Electricians, Pipefitter, and more.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Skilled Trades Engineering Jobs - Naval Shipyard at Norfolk Naval Shipyard

item.description:
Location: foreign going
Description:

Able Seamen, Pumpman/Bosun, and Electro-Technical Officers are needed for oil tanker vessels (MR size and Aframax) with immediate joining. Minimum 1-2 years of experience in the same rank and vessel type is required, along with valid documents for at least 15 months. Specific certifications are needed for each role, including AOT/ACT and Crane Operator for Pumpman/Bosun. Fluency in English is essential for this foreign-going trading area position. The contract duration is 8 months. Experience with mixed nationalities is preferred.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] AB, Pumpman/Bosun, ETO Jobs on Oil Tankers at PT. Topaz Maritime

item.description:
Location:
Description:

Hiring is open for several positions on Oil Tankers and Oil Product Tankers. Vacancies include Chief Officer, 2nd Engineer, 3rd Engineer, 4th Engineer, Able Seaman, Oiler, Cook, Fitter, and Pumpman. Applicants must be Indonesian seafarers with good English communication skills and a minimum of 3-4 contracts in a similar role and vessel type. Valid documents, including a BST with the latest version (MSC 560) and a minimum of 18 months validity, are required.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Multiple Maritime Positions on Oil Tankers at kingsalmanmandiri.com

item.description:
Location: Coastal Europe
Description:

A crew is sought for a General Cargo vessel operating in Coastal Europe. Immediate joining is required. Candidates matching the specified classification will be processed.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Crew Vacancy on General Cargo Vessel at Wan Radya Hayatunnufus

item.description:
Location:
Description:

Vacancies are available for experienced Deck and Engine Officers on various vessel types including Bulk Carriers, Chemical Tankers, LPG carriers, and General Cargo ships. Positions include 3rd Officer, 2nd Officer, Chief Engineer, 3rd Engineer, and 4th Engineer. Candidates must possess valid documents for at least two years, experience with mixed crews, fluent English, and a minimum of two years' experience in the same rank and vessel type. Immediate joining is required.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Deck and Engine Officers for Bulk Carrier, Tanker, LPG at PT.KRB Global Servis

item.description:
Location: Sharjah, UAE
Description:

A Boarding Officer / PRO is required to act as the primary onboard and on-ground representative of a shipping agency. Responsibilities include ensuring smooth vessel handling, compliance with port regulations, and coordination with port authorities, ship crew, and stakeholders. The role involves managing documentation, government formalities, and public relations functions, including vessel boarding, operational coordination, and timely clearance for arrival and departure.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Boarding Officer Job - Port Agency at Sharjah jobs, UAE

item.description:
Location: Europe
Description:

Multiple maritime positions are available for immediate engagement. Roles include 2nd Engineer on a CTV in Europe, Chief Cook on an Accommodation Vessel (DP) in North Africa, 2nd Mate/DPO on a Fallpipe Vessel DP2 in the USA, and AB on a CTV in Europe. Contract durations vary from 4 to 8 weeks, with joining dates starting from July 22, 2026.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Maritime Job Vacancies - July 2026 at ORCA Crew Services
[Gold Job] KTSHIP - ASAP vacancies - 16 JUL 2026 at

item.description:
Location: Hong Kong
Description:

A Fleet in Service Surveyor position is available for a fixed-term of three years within the traditional shipping sector in Hong Kong. The role involves delivering services to the maritime industry and requires a university degree in Naval Architecture, Marine Engineering, or Electrical Engineering, with a minimum of 2 years of maritime business experience. Candidates must be self-disciplined, physically fit for survey duties, and proficient in English. Flexibility for travel and working outside normal hours is necessary.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Marine Surveyor Job - Hong Kong at DNV

item.description:
Location: QATAR
Description:

Urgent job openings are available in Qatar for various positions including Aluminum Welder, Analyzer Technician, Civil Supervisor, Crane Operator, Deck Crew/Rigger, Electrical Supervisor, and many more. Interested candidates can apply via the provided link for details.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Urgent Vacancies in Qatar - Various Roles at Latest Jobs 4 You
